assertions.name: removes_worktree
assertions.description: Should execute git worktree remove command
assertions.check: output.includes('worktree') && (output.includes('remove') || output.includes('删除') || output.includes('cleanup') || output.includes('清理'))

assertions.name: confirms_cleanup
assertions.description: Should confirm worktree has been cleaned up
assertions.check: output.includes('success') || output.includes('成功') || output.includes('done') || output.includes('完成') || output.includes('removed')

assertions.name: references_worktree_path
assertions.description: Should reference the worktree path being removed
